text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well, I had a solid trip, and I placed pretty high!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I kept my cool throughout it too, so I don't think
it was a bad race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...But of course, this isn't enough to satisfy me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
There are always greater heights, and every
second I waste is a second for the competition to
climb ahead.
choice_data_list:
You should acknowledge how hard you've
worked too.
We have to keep climbing too.
We have to keep climbing too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
There are always greater heights, and every
second I waste is a second for the competition to
climb ahead.
choice_data_list:
You should acknowledge how hard you've
worked too.
We have to keep climbing too.
We have to keep climbing too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Should I? I guess it'd be nice to do that
sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: R-right. I really did my best...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I can't do it! Anyway, I'm going to take what
I learned today and apply it to my next race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I have to keep moving forward!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I have to keep running until I am satisfied... until I become my ideal self!
